570 CHMTHRPY_OTHR_DSCHRG_CD CHMTHRPY_OTHR_DSCHRG_CD Treatment: Chemo - Other (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving another form of chemotherapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
571 RDTN_ADMSN_CD RDTN_ADMSN_CD Treatment: Radiation (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving radiation therapy. 0 = No 
1 =
